content.sentence: Tôi cần một ___ để tập trung.

translation.en: I need a mind to focus.

notes:
tâm = mind or heart (your inner thoughts, feelings, moral center). It’s more about your inner state or conscience than your brain.

It’s usually uncountable and often appears in compounds: tâm trạng (mood), lương tâm (conscience), quan tâm (to care), yên tâm / an tâm (feel at ease), tận tâm (wholehearted).  

You can say có tâm (caring, thoughtful) vs vô tâm (careless, insensitive) — great contrast to remember.  

Sometimes people say cái tâm to stress someone’s moral heart or sincerity (not about romance, more about character).
exampleSentencesTranslated: To study well, you need to keep your mind calm and patient.
He always tries to keep his mind relaxed when facing difficulties at work.
She believes that an optimistic mind will help her overcome challenges.

example.es: Mi corazón está muy en paz.
example.vi: Tâm hồn của tôi rất bình yên.

definitions.es: Corazón o mente; a menudo se refiere al espíritu o estado emocional de una persona.
definitions.vi: Trái tim hoặc tâm trí; thường chỉ tinh thần hoặc trạng thái cảm xúc của một người.
definitions.en: Heart or mind; often refers to one's spirit or emotional state.

content.sentence: Tôi cần một ___ để tập trung.

translation.en: I need a mind to focus.

notes_md:
**tâm** = mind or heart (your inner thoughts, feelings, moral center). It’s more about your inner state or conscience than your brain.

It’s usually uncountable and often appears in compounds: **tâm trạng** (mood), **lương tâm** (conscience), **quan tâm** (to care), **yên tâm / an tâm** (feel at ease), **tận tâm** (wholehearted).  

You can say **có tâm** (caring, thoughtful) vs **vô tâm** (careless, insensitive) — great contrast to remember.  

Sometimes people say **cái tâm** to stress someone’s moral heart or sincerity (not about romance, more about character).
exampleSentences: Để học tốt, em cần giữ tâm bình tĩnh và kiên nhẫn.
Anh luôn cố gắng giữ tâm thoải mái khi gặp khó khăn trong công việc.
Chị tin rằng một tâm lạc quan sẽ giúp mình vượt qua thử thách.
